title: Colourful Pots
description: Flower Pots + add-on that makes flower pots even more stylish!
body:
![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd08bb24ec90c58bb3f76a974cfdd7806cd5f2a6.png)
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98bd6443815ed67b446e4078572df491330d8c77.gif)


[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/colorful-pots)[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colorful-pots)[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/FgypubrVmn)

***
### **📋 About**
Colourful Pots improves flower pots visually by giving each pot a unique texture depending on the potted plant.
The pack is made for Minecraft Version 1.19-1.21 and might not work with any other version.


***

### **⚠️ Installation**
**This pack is an add-on for Flower Pots + and will only work when using both resource packs**

[![Flower Pots +](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q7rNnpQc/b45b9836177f5f3700ac716427310d7de999df72_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flower-pots)

***


### **⚙️ Compatibility**
Colourful Pots currently supports 6 different mods:


[![Autumnity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cRh6MJ6n/e52c9f8a03475093aed41835661de4e323fe1c42_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity)
[![Buzzier Bees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b7vOFSIp/70e4d531729366d5da5630799a19faae98b66ccd_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees)
[![The Endergetic Expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cPle5Z8G/ab7116346e31a34af404241ed137526a8e13ef1c_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/endergetic)
[![Neapolitan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/InYMuiQt/da8f163e363ccca56701eb1fdbb8f04fcfeb3fc5_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan)
[![Quark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qnQsVE2z/aef2119751d026421b9e9dc83d4470eec9f91a16_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
[![Upgrade Aquatic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gTuTFFyz/a3a5d5ecbb899b2808fd0c9140cf3fc421ece9fd_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)
